name: Streaming Ingest Rewrite
summary: Replaced the legacy Node ingest workers with a Rust-backed pipeline behind a thin TypeScript control plane.
highlights: Cut p99 latency by 42% with no change to client SDKs
Introduced backpressure-aware batching that survived a 3-hour upstream Kafka outage

name: Dashboard Editor v2
summary: Rebuilt the dashboard editor from scratch around a React + IndexedDB local-first model.
highlights: Adopted by 80% of paying customers within three months
Lighthouse performance ≥ 95 on the editor route

name: In-House Property Management System
summary: Replaced a vendor PMS with a Next.js app integrated with point-of-sale and the events schedule.
highlights: Cut nightly close from 90 minutes to 12
